breakdown: PR fixes streaming passthrough to normalize rewards_box with non-standard keys ('xp'/'gold_pieces' vs 'xp_gained'/'gold'). The core fix adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to check alternative keys and cleanup raw keys. Test properly exercises the fix using real LLM to generate messy payloads. Minor gaps: no type hints on function signatures, and sparse inline comments beyond WHY.
key_changes: Add fallback key lookup in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: checks 'xp' when 'xp_gained' is None, 'gold_pieces' when 'gold' is None
Add cleanup to pop raw keys after normalization to prevent persisting non-standard keys
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair before returning passthrough_rewards
Add new E2E test that forces LLM to generate rewards_box with 'xp'/'gold_pieces' keys and verifies normalization converts to standard keys
